sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113310" key="xamou/lkion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰμ-ούλκιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n113310.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stludio, Gloss.,</tr_> and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰμ-ουλκίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sclodia,</tr_> ib. (both perh. <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> sq.).</sense> </entryFree>
